Since 2024, the Company has centered its strategy on an Independent Power Producer (IPP) model, developing, building, owning, and&nbsp;operating&nbsp;critical energy assets around the world.&nbsp;</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 16px;">&nbsp;</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 16px;">Energy Vault&nbsp;operates&nbsp;globally, with headquarters in Westlake Village, California and Lugano, Switzerland, and regional development across North America, Europe, Asia, and Australia. The Company partners with utilities, grid operators, and large energy consumers to deliver infrastructure that strengthens grid reliability, enables renewable integration, and supports long-term energy security.&nbsp;</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 16px;">&nbsp;</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 16px;">By combining asset ownership with advanced technologies and integration&nbsp;expertise, Energy Vault is building the next generation of critical energy infrastructure, delivering dependable power when and where it matters most.&nbsp;</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 16px;">.&nbsp;</span></p><p><b><span style="font-size: 16px;">&nbsp;</span></b></p><p><b><span style="font-size: 16px;">Our Values&nbsp;</span></b></p><p><b><span style="font-size: 16px;">We Commit:</span></b><span style="font-size: 16px;"> To Building a Better Future for Earth and All Its Beings.</span></p><p><b><span style="font-size: 16px;">We Innovate:</span></b><span style="font-size: 16px;"> Cutting Edge Solutions to Accelerate the Unique Energy Aspirations of Our Clients.</span></p><p><b><span style="font-size: 16px;">We Connect:&nbsp;</span></b><span style="font-size: 16px;">To Build Genuine Relationships.</span></p><p><b><span style="font-size: 16px;">We Deliver:&nbsp;</span></b><span style="font-size: 16px;">Going Above &amp; Beyond by Being Fast &amp; Nimble.</span></p><p><b><span style="font-size: 16px;">We Lead:&nbsp;</span></b><span style="font-size: 16px;">With Authenticity and Purpose.</span></p><p><br></p><p><strong>Your Impact as a Senior Counsel - Project Finance &amp; Commercial:</strong></p><p>We are seeking a Senior Counsel with substantial project finance experience to lead the financing of our renewable energy, battery storage, and data center infrastructure projects. This is a fast-paced, high-volume role requiring someone who can manage multiple live transactions simultaneously, operate with a high degree of independence, and engage commercially with lenders, investors, and internal business teams. The right candidate is not just a strong lawyer â they are a pragmatic problem-solver who moves quickly, communicates clearly, and keeps all deals on track.</p>\n<p></p><p><br></p><b>Your Mission:</b><div><p><strong>Project Finance:</strong></p><ul><li>Lead end-to-end legal structuring and negotiation of project finance transactions, including construction loans, term debt, tax equity, back-leverage facilities, and permanent financing for battery storage, renewable energy, and data center projects.</li><li>Draft and negotiate credit agreements, security packages, depositary and accounts agreements, consent and assignment agreements, and all related financing documents with lenders, tax equity investors, and institutional counterparties.</li><li>Advise on financing structures for build-own-operate (BOO) assets, including collateral structures, security interests, and intercreditor arrangements.</li><li>Manage lender due diligence processes and coordinate with lenders' counsel through financial close.</li><li>Advise on IRA tax credit structures, including investment tax credits (ITC) and production tax credits (PTC), domestic content requirements, energy communities, and Foreign Entity of Concern (FEOC) compliance as it relates to financing eligibility and tax credit qualification.</li><li>Support refinancings, amendments, waivers, and ongoing lender compliance matters post-close.</li><li>Simultaneously manage multiple transactions at varying stages of execution without loss of quality or attention to detail.</li></ul><p><strong>Corporate Finance:</strong></p><ul><li>Support corporate-level debt facilities, revolving credit lines, and other balance sheet financing activities.</li><li>Advise on entity structuring and capitalization for project-level subsidiaries and holding company arrangements.</li><li>Assist with corporate governance matters tied to financing transactions.</li></ul>&lt
